message:
style(fr-runtime): compact maxmemory* CONFIG entries onto single lines

The `maxmemory*` branch in collect_config_entries was using
over-broadened multi-line receiver chains for `BulkString(Some(... ))`
pushes that fit cleanly on a single line. Flatten the five entries
(maxmemory-eviction-tenacity, maxmemory-policy lookup through
self.server.store.maxmemory_policy.as_config_str(), and
maxmemory-samples via
self.server.maxmemory_eviction_sample_limit.to_string()) so the block
reads as a flat list of name/value pairs rather than a jagged mix of
short pushes and six-line method chains.

No semantic change; same frames, same ordering, same bytes on the
wire for CONFIG GET maxmemory*.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.7 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>
